_comment: Example Firebase Realtime Database security rules for the guestbook.
Copy this into the Firebase console (Realtime Database → Rules) and
replace `chat-messages` with the value of NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_CHAT_DB.
Replace AUTHOR_EMAIL with the site owner's email used for moderation.
- Require Firebase Auth (or a signed-in next-auth-bridged user) to write.
- Validate message shape and length on write.
- Restrict deletes to the message author or the site owner.
Note: next-auth does NOT automatically authenticate Firebase. If the site
currently relies on UI checks alone, plan to bridge next-auth → Firebase
via a custom token (firebase-admin signInWithCustomToken). Until that is
in place, treat the database as publicly writable and DO NOT keep PII
in the chat node beyond what the user voluntarily submits.
